message:
feat(stdlib): Complete CPython module coverage (100%)

- Add remaining test modules: test_bufio, test_cprofile, test_file, etc.
- Remove generic test_module1..10.zig files from test_capi,
  test_free_threading, and test_future_stmt directories
- Replace with properly named CPython-matching modules
- Add _test_embed_set_config, reperf, test_largefile, test_memoryio

CPython mirror check now shows 0 missing modules.
